description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring a red and white color scheme. The structure has ten visible floors, each with a series of evenly spaced windows and balconies on the front and rear facades. The building is bordered by a green lawn and a paved walkway, with a main entrance at the base of the front side. The exterior walls are primarily white with bold red vertical and horizontal accents framing the windows and balconies. The roof is flat and unadorned, and the windows are arranged in a highly symmetrical grid pattern. The overall appearance is functional and straightforward, typical of mid-to-late 20th-century urban residential architecture.
description: A tall, rectangular apartment building with ten floors, red and white exterior, and symmetrical rows of windows and balconies. The structure is modern and utilitarian, surrounded by a green lawn and paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical balconies, and a grid of windows framed by red accents.
description_view_1: Side view with no balconies, only rows of windows and red framing, and a small roof structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a central vertical red stripe, symmetrical balconies, and a secondary entrance at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with only windows and red framing, and a small roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly symmetrical, evenly spaced grid pattern across all floors, with each floor having a consistent number of windows aligned vertically and horizontally.
